actionCalls.description: To Convert the selected Voucher Definition Names from Semi colon separated values to List<String>

actionCalls.description: To Convert the selected Voucher Definition Names from Semi colon separated values to List<String>

value.stringValue: There is some problem while fetching the Voucher Eligibility Rule. Reach out to System Admin for more information.
There is some problem while fetching the products available for voucher ordering. Reach out to System Admin for more information.
Unable to query Voucher Definition Records
An error happened while getting the Voucher Eligibility Rule record by recordId, please check the fault message for details.
Unable to query Voucher Eligibility Rule for Hotel Properties
Unable to query Voucher Definition Records for Hotel Properties
Error happened on an apex action.
Get Included List Sub Regions element failed.
Get Included Code List Chain failed.
Get Excluded Code List Chain failed.
Get Excluded Code List Brand failed.
Get Included Code List Hotel Property failed.
Get Excluded Code List Hotel Propery failed.
Unable to query Sub Region Records
Unable to query Account Record Type
Unable to query Account Records for Hotel Properties
Unable to query Account Record Type

rules.name: VD_Selected_or_Inactive_Rule_Other_IHG
rules.label: VD Selected or Inactive Rule (Other IHG)

fields.name: Step2TextV2
fields.fieldText: Step 2 of 2 - Rule Conditions﻿

fields.name: ReqText
fields.fieldText: *= Required Information

fields.name: Voucher_Definitions_For_Ordering_hotelv1
fields.fieldText: Voucher Definitions For Ordering

fields.name: VoucherDefTextV3
fields.fieldText:
Voucher Definition To Include

If no voucher definition selected, none will apply to decision

At least one voucher definition record must be selected when setting the rule to "Active"

fields.name: Hotel_Locations_For_OrderingV1
fields.fieldText: Hotel Locations For Ordering

fields.name: RegionTextV1
fields.fieldText:
* Regions To Include

At least one region must be selected to complete the action

fields.name: SubRegion_Selection_MethodV1
fields.fieldText: SubRegion Selection Method

fields.name: subRegionIncludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
SubRegions To Include

If no subregion selected, none will apply to decision

fields.name: SubRegionExcludeTextV2
fields.fieldText:
SubRegions To Exclude

If no subregion selected, none will apply to decision

fields.name: Country_Selection_MethodV1
fields.fieldText: Country Selection Method

fields.name: CountryIncludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
Country To Include

If no country selected, none will apply to decision

fields.name: CountryExcludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
Country To Exclude

If no country selected, none will apply to decision

fields.name: Chains_Brands_Hotel_Properties_For_OrderingV1
fields.fieldText: Chains, Brands & Hotel Properties For Ordering

fields.name: Chain_Selection_MethodV1
fields.fieldText: Chain Selection Method

fields.name: ChainIncludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
* Chain To Include

At least one chain must be selected to complete the action

fields.name: ChainExcludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
* Chain To Exclude

At least one chain must be selected to complete the action

fields.name: Brand_Selection_MethodV1
fields.fieldText: Brand Selection Method

fields.name: BrandIncludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
Brand To Include

If no brand selected, none will apply to decision

fields.name: BrandExcludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
Brand To Exclude

If no brand selected, none will apply to decision

fields.name: Hotel_Property_Selection_MethodV1
fields.fieldText: Hotel Property Selection Method

fields.name: HotelPropertyIncludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
Hotel Property To Include

If no hotel property selected, none will apply to decision

fields.name: HotelPropertyExcludeTextV1
fields.fieldText:
Hotel Property To Exclude

If no hotel property selected, none will apply to decision

fields.fieldText: Step 2 of 2 - Rule Conditions

fields.name: Voucher_Definitions_For_Ordering
fields.fieldText: Voucher Definitions For Ordering

fields.name: VoucherDefTextV1
fields.fieldText:
Voucher Definition To Include

If no voucher definition selected, none will apply to decision

At least one voucher definition record must be selected when setting the rule to "Active"

fields.fieldText: Account For Ordering

value.stringValue: Voucher Eligibility Rule has been created successfully.
Voucher Eligibility Rule has been created successfully.

fields.name: UnabletoCompleteTheActionDisplayText
fields.fieldText: Unable To Complete The Action

fields.name: AtLeastOneVDisRequired
fields.fieldText: At least one Voucher Definition record is required to set the rule to Active.

fields.fieldText: At least one Chain record needs to be selected to complete this action.
